name: Service Binary Path Update Followed by User or Group Modification
notes: This rule triggers when a service binary path is updated and a user or a group is modified on the same host.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update
BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed

BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update match with the same Source IP
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update match with the same Source IP
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update match with the same Source IP
TD_list: APPLY Service Binary Path Update Followed by User or Group Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update match with the same Source IP
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Service Binary Path Changed followed by a User or Group Added
Event description: Detected a Service Binary Path Changed followed by a User or Group Added
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
